rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Common BloodHound Command-Line Options (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Common BloodHound Command-Line Options (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 2b7d1fff-74b3-496c-b8f9-3bd90ba102c5
status: experimental
description: Detects common BloodHound parameters in command line strings. Part of
  the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/bloodhound/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0521
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -collectionmethod
    - invoke-bloodhound
    - get-bloodhounddata
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
